faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.leadIn: Quick answers before you start — no surprises
faq.q1: How much does a campaign cost?
faq.a1: You pay in Spark based on expected redemptions. Tiers start at a clear basic level with no hidden fees.
faq.q2: How does a follower redeem a prize?
faq.a2: They enter the code on their phone, fill in their details, and receive the prize instantly with optional camera verification.
faq.q3: Do I need a large following?
faq.a3: No. Even small audiences succeed when the prize is attractive and the code is easy to share.
faq.a4: Yes. Register as a sponsor, top up your wallet, and link your campaign to a creator or launch directly.
faq.a5: They differ in code count, camera verification, PDF export, and co-campaigns with partners.
